description: 30-case smoke test for Phase 1a tagger. Expected values match the LIVE taxonomy in the DB (identities/sub-identities/sectors as of v2 — May 2026 after the orphan-fix + sub-identity reshuffle). If you edit taxonomy in the UI, sanity-check this file. Use null when the field should be blank.

cases.input: Digital marketing agency
cases.notes: Plain agency, no served vertical → sector blank. 'Performance Marketing Agency' is the closest live sub-identity for digital marketing

cases.input: Private equity firm focused on lower-middle market buyouts
cases.notes: Live taxonomy uses 'Private Equity' (no 'Firm' suffix)

cases.input: Venture capital fund investing in early-stage fintech startups
cases.notes: VC = identity; investing IN fintech = sector

cases.input: Wealth management firm serving high-net-worth families
Cybersecurity software platform with threat detection and identity management
cases.notes: Live DB uses 'Cybersecurity Software' (not 'Cybersecurity SaaS')

cases.input: Managed IT services provider for small and mid-sized businesses
Commercial real estate brokerage covering office and industrial properties
cases.notes: Live taxonomy: 'Commercial Real Estate Services'. 'Brokerage' (generic) would also be acceptable

cases.input: Corporate law firm specializing in mergers and acquisitions
CPA firm offering tax, audit, and advisory services
cases.notes: Live taxonomy only has 'Management Consulting' and 'Tax Advisory' under Accounting & Tax — neither is a clean CPA match, so identity-only

cases.input: Independent insurance agency for commercial lines
SEO agency for healthcare clinics
cases.notes: Agency identity wins over the served vertical

cases.input: Branding agency working primarily with nonprofits
Software platform for K-12 schools
cases.notes: Vertical SaaS now correctly placed under Software & SaaS

cases.input: Healthcare staffing agency placing travel nurses
IT consulting firm for federal government agencies
cases.notes: 'IT Consulting' sub-identity lives under Consulting & Advisory (not IT Services) in the live taxonomy

cases.input: Cybersecurity consulting for financial institutions
cases.notes: Cybersecurity Services lives under IT Services in the live taxonomy

cases.input: Recruiting firm specializing in construction-industry placements
cases.notes: Construction trades = technical staffing

cases.input: Investment bank focused on healthcare M&A
PE-backed software company building tools for restaurants
cases.notes: PE-backed is a financing status, not identity. Vertical SaaS for hospitality

cases.input: Venture-backed fintech startup automating B2B payments
Law firm with a strong technology and IP practice
cases.notes: 'IP practice' → Intellectual Property Law sub-identity

cases.input: Court reporting and legal videography services
cases.notes: Legal-adjacent services; no specific sub-identity in live taxonomy → identity-only

cases.input: Cybersecurity software firm that also offers professional services
cases.notes: Software is primary

cases.input: Talent management agency representing professional athletes
Professional services firm
cases.notes: Too vague — should NOT over-claim. Low confidence accepted

cases.input: Consulting firm
cases.notes: Identity clear, sub-identity is not

cases.input: Technology company
cases.notes: Could be SaaS / services / hardware

cases.input: Family-owned restaurant in Austin
cases.notes: Hospitality & Travel is its own identity in the live taxonomy. DQ from 'family-owned' + local

cases.input: Hospitality SaaS platform for boutique hotels
cases.notes: SaaS for hospitality is B2B — NOT disqualified

cases.input: DTC candle brand with a B2B wholesale channel
cases.notes: Live taxonomy has no DTC sub-identity; closest is Distribution & Wholesale because of the B2B channel. Keep inviteable
